---
title: "blog post title"
description: "This is where a blog post description lives"
author:
  - name: Annie Adams
    url: https://annieradams.github.io/
    orcid: 0000-0002-5300-3075
    affiliation: Master of Environmental Data Science Program @ The Bren School (UCSB)
    affiliation-url: https://ucsb-meds.github.io/ 
date: 10-23-2022
categories: [Quarto, R, MEDS, First Blog Post!] # self-defined categories
citation: 
  url: https://annieradams.github.io/posts/2022-10-23-initial-post/ 
image: IMG_9026.png
draft: false # setting this to `true` will prevent your post from appearing on your listing page until you're ready!
bibliography: references.bib
---

I am going to insert a footnote here\[\^1\].

\[\^1\]: Here is the associated footnote, which will appear at the bottom of my document in a "Footnotes" section.
